name: bai-desktop
description: Browser AI Agent Desktop — local services for BAI (shell, diagnostics, etc.)

scripts.start: tsc && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && electron .
scripts.build: tsc && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/
scripts.make: tsc && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && electron-forge make
scripts.package: tsc && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && electron-forge package
